name: 功与能
subject: physics
curriculum_points: HS-PS3-1. Create a computational model to calculate the change in the energy of one component in a system when the change in energy of the other component(s) and energy flows in and out of the system are known.

HS-PS3-2. Develop and use models to illustrate that energy at the macroscopic scale can be accounted for as a combination of energy associated with the motions of particles (objects) and energy associated with the relative positions of particles (objects).
HS-PS3-3. Design, build, and refine a device that works within given constraints to convert one form of energy into another form of energy.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 物理公式可视化：调节参数观察物理量关系

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「功与能」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：HS-PS3-1. Create a computational model to calculate the change in the energy of one component in a system when the chang…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：HS-PS3-2. Develop and use models to illustrate that energy at the macroscopic sc… 对理解「功与能」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
